description: The Maurya and Gupta empires encompassed dozens of formerly independent kingdoms over an area of 5 million square kilometers, with populations of close to 60 million people. The Indian regents held the title Emperor of Emperors and commanded standing armies of hundreds of thousands of infantry, nearly ten thousand elephants, thousands of chariots, and tens of thousands of horse cavalry, making them arguably the largest armies of their time.
tooltip: [font="sans-bold-14"]• Gupta and Maurya Players +10% maximum population.[/font]
